descriptionHtml:
Beneteau Oceanis 35.1 for sale 2019 | 3 Cabins Version | Tax Not Paid

ONE OWNER - Only 150 hours engine use!!!!

If you are searching for a modern cruising yacht that is both practical and stylish, the Beneteau Oceanis 35.1 for sale 2019 is a compelling option to consider. This vessel is in good condition, with only one private owner since new, and she has been thoughtfully equipped and maintained. The Oceanis 35.1, designed by Finot-Conq, balances ease of handling with comfort for extended cruising or weekends with family and friends.

General Information:

  • Builder: Cantiere Beneteau
  • Model: Oceanis 35.1
  • Designer: Finot-Conq
  • Launched: 2019
  • Flag: Italian
  • Overall Length: 10.45 m
  • Beam: 3.73 m
  • Draft: 1.94 m
  • Displacement: 5,966 kg
  • Registration: Natante
  • Maximum Persons: 10
  • Ownership: 1 private owner
  • Hull Colour: Blue

Deck and Hull:

  • Hull Material: GRP (vtr)
  • Cockpit Teak: Yes, on seating
  • Cushions: Yes
  • Keel Material: Steel
  • Keel Shape: Bulb (siluro)
  • Sprayhood: Yes
  • Bimini: Yes
  • Cockpit Table: Yes
  • Helm Cover, Table Cover: Yes
  • External Cushion Set: Technical blue fabric
  • Full sun awnings with side sunscreens

Accommodation:

  • Double Cabins: 3
  • Dinette Berths: 2
  • Bathrooms: 1
  • Shower Cubicle: 1
  • Cooker: 2-burner
  • Oven: Yes
  • Refrigerator: Yes

Engine and Propulsion:

  • Engine: Yanmar 3YM30AE diesel
  • Power: 21.3 kW
  • Year: 2019
  • Engine Hours: 150 (as of Jan 2025)
  • Fuel Tank: 130 litres
  • Propeller: Folding blades
  • Steering: Twin wheel

Onboard Systems:

  • Autopilot: Yes
  • VHF: Yes
  • Log: Yes
  • Tridata: Yes
  • Compass: Yes
  • Stereo: Yes
  • Plotter: Yes
  • Wind Instrument: Yes (BWS brand)
  • AIS: Yes
  • Electrical system: 12 V
  • Batteries: 2 (engine and service)
  • Water Tanks: 2 (total 260 litres, PVC)
  • Bilge Pump: Automatic
  • Battery Charger: Yes
  • Air Conditioning: Yes
  • Water Heater (boiler): Yes
  • Water Pressure Pump: Yes
  • Black Water Tank: Yes
  • External Shower: Yes

Rigging and Sails:

  • Mast: Aluminium, keel-stepped
  • Winches: 4 (Harken)
  • Lazy Bag: Yes
  • Rigid Vang: Yes
  • Mainsail Furling: Yes
  • Furling Genoa: Yes
  • Sails: White; main sail in as-new condition

Anchor and Safety Equipment:

  • Electric Anchor Windlass with remote in cockpit
  • Anchor: Yes
  • Chain: 50 m
  • Mooring Lines: Yes
  • Life Raft: Yes (requires servicing)
  • Fenders: 6

This Beneteau Oceanis 35.1 for sale 2019 offers a balanced package for those looking to cruise the Mediterranean or further afield. If you are interested in a well-kept and thoughtfully specified Oceanis 35.1, this could be your next boat, contact us!
